name: Urdaibai BTT Center Route 2
name_original: Centro BTT Urdaibai Ruta 2 – circular desde Ajangiz
description: This moderate 11.8-mile mountain biking route in the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve offers lush forests and scenic hills from Ajangiz.
region_intro: Mountain biking around Ajangiz features a diverse landscape characterized by rolling hills, dense woodlands, and the natural beauty of the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve. The region offers varied terrain, from challenging climbs to scenic paths through villages and historical sites. Many mountain bike trails in Ajangiz provide views of the surrounding valleys and the opportunity to explore the local environment. Best mountain bike trails around Ajangiz The most popular mountain bike trail is Centro BTT Urdaibai Ruta 8 – Reserva de la Biosfera de Urdaibai, a 29.1 miles (46.8 km) trail that takes 4 hours 32 minutes to complete, navigating the diverse terrain of the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve. Another top favourite among local mountain bikers is Urdaibai BTT Center Route 2, a moderate 11.8 miles (19.0 km) path. This route offers a balanced ride through the BTT Center's designated trails. Local mountain bikers also love the Sollube Summit – Summit of Sollube loop from Gernika, a 22.7 miles (36.5 km) trail leading through hilly terrain towards Sollube Summit, often completed in about 3 hours 2 minutes. Mountain biking around Ajangiz is defined by hilly terrain, natural reserves, and paths connecting local villages. The network offers options for easy mountain bike trails as well as more challenging routes for advanced mountain biking. The routes in Ajangiz are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.8 stars from over 90 reviews. More than 1200 mountain bikers have used komoot to explore Ajangiz's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many mountain bike trails are there around Ajangiz?
A: There are over 100 mountain bike trails around Ajangiz, offering a wide range of options for different skill levels and preferences.

Q: Are there easy mountain bike trails suitable for beginners in Ajangiz?
A: Yes, Ajangiz offers several easy mountain bike trails. There are 5 routes specifically categorized as easy, perfect for those new to mountain biking or looking for a more relaxed ride.

Q: What are some challenging mountain bike trails for advanced riders in Ajangiz?
A: For advanced riders seeking a challenge, Ajangiz features 39 difficult mountain bike routes. One notable difficult trail is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1058337773/centro-btt-urdaibai-ruta-8-reserva-de-la-biosfera-de-urdaibai" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Centro BTT Urdaibai Ruta 8 – Reserva de la Biosfera de Urdaibai&lt;/a&gt;, which covers 29.1 miles (46.8 km) with significant elevation changes.

Q: Are there any family-friendly mountain bike routes in Ajangiz?
A: While specific 'family-friendly' routes aren't explicitly categorized, the 5 easy trails available would be the most suitable options for families with children or those looking for less strenuous rides. These routes typically feature gentler terrain.

Q: What is the best time of year for mountain biking in Ajangiz?
A: The best time for mountain biking in Ajangiz is generally during spring (April to June) and autumn (September to October). During these seasons, the weather is typically mild, and the natural landscape of the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve is particularly vibrant, offering comfortable riding conditions.

Q: Are there mountain bike trails that offer viewpoints or scenic spots in Ajangiz?
A: Yes, many mountain bike trails in Ajangiz pass through scenic areas within the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve, offering views of the surrounding valleys and coastline. For specific viewpoints, consider routes that lead towards &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/1436728" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Sollube Summit&lt;/a&gt; or areas with views over the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5269209" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Urdaibai marsh&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: Can I find loop mountain bike trails around Ajangiz?
A: Yes, Ajangiz offers several excellent loop mountain bike trails. A popular option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/20506912" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Sollube Summit – Summit of Sollube loop from Gernika&lt;/a&gt;, a 22.7-mile (36.5 km) route that takes you through hilly terrain. Another is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/15001962" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Arrola Oppidum loop from Institutoa&lt;/a&gt;.

Q: What kind of natural attractions can I see along the mountain bike trails in Ajangiz?
A: Mountain bike trails in Ajangiz often traverse areas rich in natural beauty. You might encounter the unique &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/3921343" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Artzubi Bridge&lt;/a&gt;, explore parts of the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/6628930" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Oma Forest&lt;/a&gt;, or enjoy expansive views over the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5269209" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Urdaibai marsh&lt;/a&gt;, which is part of the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve.

Q: Are there any historical or cultural landmarks near the mountain bike routes?
A: Yes, the region around Ajangiz is dotted with historical and cultural sites. You might pass by the historic &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/1050528" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Old Tree of Gernika (Gernikako Arbola)&lt;/a&gt; or explore routes that connect local villages, offering glimpses into the area's heritage. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/10513326" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Artzubi Bridge – Ajangiz Village and Church loop from Gernika&lt;/a&gt; is an example of a route that combines natural and cultural sights.

Q: What do other mountain bikers say about the trails in Ajangiz?
A: The mountain bike trails in Ajangiz are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 4.8 stars from over 95 reviews. Riders often praise the diverse terrain, the natural beauty of the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve, and the well-maintained paths that connect villages and offer scenic views.

Q: How long are the mountain bike trails in Ajangiz typically?
A: The mountain bike trails in Ajangiz vary significantly in length. For example, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1058382858/urdaibai-btt-center-route-2" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Urdaibai BTT Center Route 2&lt;/a&gt; is a moderate 11.8 miles (19.0 km) ride, while the challenging &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1058337773/centro-btt-urdaibai-ruta-8-reserva-de-la-biosfera-de-urdaibai" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Centro BTT Urdaibai Ruta 8 – Reserva de la Biosfera de Urdaibai&lt;/a&gt; extends to 29.1 miles (46.8 km).
tips:
It is located 3 km from Gernika, on the slope of a hill that makes it a natural viewpoint of Gernika and the Oka river plain. It is an essentially rural municipality, with a monumental Church in the Mendieta neighborhood, the central nucleus of the town, in whose surroundings there is also the rectory, the town hall, in neoclassical style.

In 1947 Ajangiz became part of Gernika, until in 1987 the de-annexation commission was formed. That finally took place in 1991, becoming from this date a municipality with its own entity.

www.ajangiz.net
Nice trail along the edge of a tree farm. It can get overgrown at times and when wet it can be difficult, but overall a good trail.
This trail starts just outside of Berroia. It's a very nice trail, mostly straight, that takes you through a beautiful forest.

faqs.question: How difficult is the Centro BTT Urdaibai Ruta 2 mountain bike trail?
faqs.answer: This route is rated as moderate, meaning it requires good fitness but is generally suitable for all skill levels. Technically, it corresponds to an STS S2 difficulty.

faqs.question: Where does the Centro BTT Urdaibai Ruta 2 trail start, and is there parking available?
faqs.answer: The trail is a circular route that starts and ends in the village of Ajangiz. As part of the Urdaibai Bike Reserve network, it's likely that services such as parking are available within the BTT center infrastructure in the area, enhancing accessibility for riders.

faqs.question: What kind of terrain can I expect on this mountain bike route?
faqs.answer: You can expect varied terrain typical of the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve. The route will likely feature a mix of natural paths, potentially some paved or unpaved sections, traversing undulating hills and lush forests of oak, beech, and pine. The region's oceanic climate contributes to a 'green paradise' feel.

faqs.question: What are the best times of year to ride this trail?
faqs.answer: Given the oceanic climate of the Urdaibai region, spring and autumn generally offer the most pleasant conditions for mountain biking, with mild temperatures and lush scenery. Summer can also be good, but be prepared for warmer weather. Winters are typically mild but can be wet.

faqs.question: Are there any notable sights or highlights along the route?
faqs.answer: Yes, the route offers several points of interest. You'll pass through the charming Ajangiz Village and Church. You'll also experience the unique atmosphere of the Eucalyptus Trail in Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve and tackle the exciting Arganabide Singletrack.

faqs.question: Does this trail intersect with other well-known paths?
faqs.answer: Yes, this route shares sections with several other paths. You'll find yourself on parts of the [CIMA BI13] Monte Oiz * Gernika, Ardoaren eta arrainaren bidea, Northern Route (Basque Country), and [CIMA BI13] Monte Oiz * Zugastieta trails.

faqs.question: Is the Centro BTT Urdaibai Ruta 2 trail dog-friendly?
faqs.answer: While the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve is a natural area, specific regulations for dogs on BTT trails can vary. It's generally advisable to keep dogs on a leash to protect local wildlife and ensure a safe experience for all trail users. Check local signage or the Urdaibai BTT Center for precise rules.

faqs.question: Do I need any special permits or pay an entrance fee to access the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve or this trail?
faqs.answer: The Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve is a UNESCO-declared natural area, but typically, there are no general entrance fees or special permits required for recreational activities like mountain biking on designated trails. However, always respect local regulations and signage within the reserve.

faqs.question: Are there any amenities like cafes or restaurants near the Ajangiz trailhead?
faqs.answer: Ajangiz is a small village, so while specific amenities directly at the trailhead might be limited, the broader Urdaibai region, especially nearby towns, offers various cafes, restaurants, and accommodation options. It's a good idea to plan for refreshments before or after your ride.

faqs.question: What kind of natural features or wildlife might I encounter in the Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve?
faqs.answer: The Urdaibai Biosphere Reserve is a natural jewel known for its diverse ecosystems. You'll ride through lush forests of oak, beech, and pine. The reserve is also famous for its marshes and is a significant birdwatching area, so you might spot various bird species. Keep an eye out for the rich vegetation and natural beauty that defines this 'green paradise'.

faqs.question: Is this mountain bike route suitable for families with children?
faqs.answer: Given its 'moderate' difficulty rating and STS S2 technical grade, this route is best suited for families with older children who have some mountain biking experience and good fitness. Younger children or absolute beginners might find some sections challenging.
